Welcome to Hyprverse Campus!

  HQ (north)       — meeting rooms D, E, F
  Auditorium (NE)  — presentations & broadcast
  Plaza (center)   — open collaboration
  Cafe (SW)        — social lounge
  Coworking (SE)   — open desk pods

Tip: use the portal in the park
to shortcut across campus!
